arguments.argument: if type=0 { draw_set_alpha(1) draw_set_color(backColor) draw_rectangle(-1,yStart,room_width+1,room_height+1,0) } else if type=1 { colorJungleTop=make_color_rgb(232-(oPlayer1.x/32),120-(oPlayer1.x/64),80-(oPlayer1.x/128)) colorJungleBottom=make_color_rgb(240-(oPlayer1.x/32),168-(oPlayer1.x/64),40) draw_set_alpha(1) draw_set_color(colorJungleTop) draw_rectangle(-1,-1,room_width+1,yStart,0) draw_rectangle_color(-1,yStart,room_width+1,yEnd,colorJungleTop,colorJungleTop,colorJungleBottom,colorJungleBottom,0) draw_set_color(colorJungleBottom) draw_rectangle(-1,yEnd,room_width+1,room_height+1,0) }
